summary: Made a surgical exit-continuity edit so the chapter now hands directly into the cemetery labor, rope-burned thumb, and paid-hearing aftermath assumed by the chapter_05 boundary excerpt. The opening structure was left intact because it already differs from the visible adjacent opening scaffold, and no calibration-only example lines were present in the style file to replace.
edits: Extended the closing beat to send Della from the schoolhouse toward the cemetery instead of leaving the aftermath implicit.
Added a brief forward bridge to the four-dollar payment, grave dust, and thumb rope-burn state carried into the next chapter.
